title: Harvest Now, Decrypt Later: The Present-Day Quantum Threat
description: Understand why the quantum threat is urgent today, not just in the future. Learn about adversaries collecting encrypted data now for future quantum decryption.
learningObjectives: Explain the 'harvest now, decrypt later' (HNDL) attack strategy
Identify data types most vulnerable to HNDL attacks
Understand which adversaries are likely conducting HNDL operations
Assess your organization's exposure to retrospective decryption
Calculate the effective deadline for quantum-resistant encryption
Prioritize data protection based on longevity requirements
